Description: Unique station identifier. Sourced from the curated stations_v1 layer in tod_database.gdb. Stations manually added during the Step 1 GIS review retain the ID assigned at that time.
Human-readable station name sourced from GTFS or assigned during the Step 1 manual GIS review.
GTFS location type. All records in this layer are location_type = 1 (Station). See https://gtfs.org/documentation/schedule/reference/#stopstxt for reference.

Flag indicating whether the station was manually added to the curated GDB during the Step 1 GIS review rather than sourced natively from GTFS. Manually added stations include SFMTA light rail stops not co-located with a BART station, VTA light rail stops, and BRT stops.
